checklistReview.reasoning: A valid South African ID document (green ID book) is present. The document shows clear details including ID number, name, and photograph. The document appears to be authentic.
No proof of residential address was found among the uploaded documents. A utility bill, bank statement, or municipal rates account not older than 3 months is required.
A source of funds declaration is present but appears to be self-certified without supporting documentation. For a MEDIUM-risk client, additional corroboration may be required.

missingDocuments: Proof of residential address (utility bill, bank statement, or municipal rates account — not older than 3 months)
riskFlags: Missing proof of address — a fundamental FICA section 21 requirement
Source of funds declaration is self-certified without independent corroboration

recommendedActions.reasoning: The South African ID document satisfies FICA section 21 identity verification requirements. The document is clear, appears authentic, and matches the client record.
Proof of residential address is required under FICA section 21 for address verification. Please request a utility bill, bank statement, or municipal rates account not older than 3 months.
